title: lauro-cerasus officinalis f. zabeliana
intro: Lauro-cerasus officinalis f. zabeliana, also known as the Korean cherry or Zabel's cherry plum, is a variant of the Prunus avium species. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Korea, valued for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant contains bioactive compounds that may help to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Lauro-cerasus officinalis f. zabeliana is used in traditional Korean medicine and can be prepared as a tea, extract, or powder for various health benefits.
